concentrationNarrative: One vendor is absorbing too much of the model-layer decision surface.
nextMove: Stand up one board-visible fallback path for every customer-facing model workflow above the premium margin threshold.

lane: Cloud AI bundle and hosting estate
concentrationNarrative: Convenience is drifting into stack-level dependency.
nextMove: Force one renewal packet that prices AI, cloud, and identity together and separately before the next contract cycle.

concentrationNarrative: Compliance packaging is reusable, but still too dependent on one external proof shape.
nextMove: Publish one vendor-neutral evidence index and force every trust packet to resolve through it first.

lane: Data pipelines and model fine-tuning estate
concentrationNarrative: The estate can grow, but it cannot pivot cheaply enough yet.
nextMove: Create one provider-neutral export bundle for prompts, evals, and tuning traces before the next major vendor negotiation.

concentrationNarrative: Commercial upside is real, but pricing leverage is uneven.
nextMove: Attach one alternate-provider or degraded-mode plan to every revenue-critical AI workflow above the margin review threshold.

concentrationNarrative: The strategy sounds diversified faster than the implementation proves it.
nextMove: Add one quarterly substitution drill and one confidence score to every concentrated executive-intelligence lane.
